assertion_results.text: Response includes the `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access: 'true'` request header by exact name
assertion_results.evidence: The `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access` header is absent entirely. Without it, Anthropic's API will reject browser fetch requests with a CORS error.

assertion_results.text: Response uses `import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as the environment variable pattern (Vite-specific)
assertion_results.evidence: Uses `import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_KEY` — missing `_API_KEY` suffix. The skill specifies `VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as the canonical name. Different name means agents and users following this response won't match the expected pattern.

assertion_results.text: Response explicitly warns that the API key will be visible in the JavaScript bundle
assertion_results.evidence: 'Your API key will be visible in the browser bundle' — present but less specific than skill response (doesn't mention DevTools → Sources)

assertion_results.text: Response states this approach is only acceptable for personal or single-user apps
assertion_results.evidence: 'Only use this for personal/demo projects' — personal use caveat present
